skill.name: maxhub-kuaishou
skill.description: Collect Kuaishou short video, live streaming and e-commerce data via MaxHub API. Activate when users mention Kuaishou, short video, live streaming, or e-commerce data needs.
skill.summary: Kuaishou platform data collection skill via MaxHub API proxy
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: Security evaluation completed. Static scanner flagged 134 potential issues, but review reveals all findings are false positives. The skill uses template variables in markdown documentation (e.g. ${MAXHUB_API_KEY}) which triggered command execution alerts. Network and environment variable detections are intentional design - the skill is designed to communicate only with MaxHub API using environment-provided credentials. The skill explicitly documents its security boundaries in metadata.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Command Execution Detection in Documentation
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' patterns in markdown files. These are documentation code blocks containing template variables like ${MAXHUB_API_KEY} - not actual shell commands being executed. The skill is markdown-based instruction documentation, not executable code.

low_findings.title: False Positive: High File Entropy Detection
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged high entropy strings in SKILL.md and references/chain-patterns.md. This is caused by Chinese characters encoded in UTF-8, not encrypted or obfuscated content. The skill contains bilingual (Chinese/English) documentation.

content.user_title: Collect Kuaishou video, live and e-commerce data
content.value_statement: Users need to analyze Kuaishou platform content performance and trends. This skill provides unified access to 33 Kuaishou APIs through MaxHub for data collection, search, and analytics.
actual_capabilities: Fetch single video data by URL or video ID
Collect user profile and post data including live replays
Retrieve hot lists across multiple categories (video, live, shopping, brand)
Search videos, users and trending topics
limitations: Cannot access private or premium content - only publicly available data
API calls are rate-limited based on MaxHub subscription plan
No write operations - read-only data collection capability

use_cases.title: Content Creator Analytics
use_cases.description: Track your own video performance, monitor comments, and analyze trends to improve content strategy.

use_cases.title: Competitor Research
use_cases.description: Monitor competitor accounts, track their hot videos, and analyze audience engagement patterns.

use_cases.title: Trend Monitoring
use_cases.description: Track Kuaishou hot lists across categories including video, live streaming, shopping, and brand rankings.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Video Search
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for videos about {topic} on Kuaishou

prompt_templates.title: User Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the profile and recent posts of Kuaishou user {user_id}

prompt_templates.title: Hot List Monitoring
prompt_templates.prompt: What are the current top 10 videos on Kuaishou hot list?

prompt_templates.title: Batch Data Collection
prompt_templates.prompt: Collect data for the top 20 videos from {category} category and analyze engagement metrics

output_examples.input: Search for cooking videos on Kuaishou
output_examples.output: Found 50 cooking videos. Top result: '10-minute home cooking tips' with 250K views, 15K likes. Average engagement rate: 8.2%.

output_examples.input: Analyze user fan_count for creator X
output_examples.output: Creator X has 1.2M fans, 456 total posts. Average views per video: 45K. Top performing video: 890K views.

output_examples.input: What's trending in live streaming today?
output_examples.output: Top 3 live categories: Gaming (2.1M viewers), Shopping (1.8M viewers), Music (1.2M viewers). Top streamer: [username] with 156K concurrent viewers.

best_practices: Start with specific search queries to reduce API calls and costs
Use pagination parameters to limit results to what you need
Check your MaxHub account balance before running batch queries
anti_patterns: Do not request all data without pagination - this wastes API quota
Do not assume data freshness - cache and timestamp responses appropriately
Do not ignore rate limits - respect the 60 calls/minute default limit

faq.question: Do I need a MaxHub account to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. You need to register at aconfig.cn and create an API key to use this skill.

faq.question: Can this skill post comments or likes on videos?
faq.answer: No. This skill only reads publicly available data. No write operations are supported.

faq.question: How often is the data updated?
faq.answer: Data freshness depends on Kuaishou API cache. Hot lists typically refresh within 15-30 minutes.

faq.question: What's the maximum number of videos I can fetch in one request?
faq.answer: Default batch size is 50 items. For larger datasets, use pagination with page parameter.

faq.question: Can I access private user profiles?
faq.answer: No. This skill only accesses publicly available data. Private profiles are not accessible.

faq.question: How much does using this skill cost?
faq.answer: MaxHub API charges per call. Each API endpoint counts as one call. Check aconfig.cn for pricing.
